original_image_tags: A photograph of a portion of a typewritten letter on "Federal Bureau of Investigation / United States Department of Justice" letterhead. The top right corner features a "FOR VICTORY BUY UNITED STATES WAR BONDS AND STAMPS" poster. A handwritten name "Hotchkiss" appears in blue ink. Multiple stamps and handwritten notations are present, including a "RECORDED EX-93" stamp, a file number "62-83894-128", and a date stamp "5 5 OCT 22 1947". A large, cursive initial "d" is written in red ink on the right margin.

elements.description: FBI seal in the top left corner and a 'FOR VICTORY BUY UNITED STATES WAR BONDS AND STAMPS' propaganda label in the top right corner.

judge.reason: Description A provides multiple specific visual details (handwritten name 'Hotchkiss', 'RECORDED EX-93' stamp, file number, date stamp, red cursive 'd') that are completely absent from Description B, which only identifies two generic labels, indicating a major discrepancy in the reported visual content.
